mapper.select: SELECT * FROM doc_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM doc_info WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM doc_info WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM doc_info WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
